name: Sarah Chen
bio: Study buddy from CS 101. Now working as a Senior Dev. We usually meet for dim sum or local trail runs.

name: Marcus Thompson
bio: Grew up in the same neighborhood. Enthusiastic about retro consoles and indie games. We talk weekly.

name: Elena Rodriguez
bio: Former colleague from the design agency. She has a great eye for street photography. Need to catch up on her latest gallery.

name: James Wilson
bio: Lives two doors down. We bonded over lifting weights and urban planning. Great guy to grab a coffee with.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Traveled through Southeast Asia together in 2019. We share a long-distance friendship and chat every few months.

name: David Park
bio: Lead guitarist in our old college band. Still composes soundtracks. We try to check in every two weeks.

name: Chloe Baker
bio: Met at a sourdough workshop. She gives the best baking advice. We exchange recipes frequently.

name: Samira Haddad
bio: My first manager. She taught me everything about project management. We usually meet for lunch once a quarter.

name: Leo Vance
bio: Co-founder of a local fintech startup. We play tennis on Sunday mornings when the weather allows.

name: Maya Okafor
bio: Met in an English Lit seminar. She's now a freelance journalist. We share book recommendations monthly.
